List all compound names in alphabetical order

Schema:
CREATE TABLE compounds (
  compound_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT,
  formula TEXT,
  molecular_weight REAL,
  is_toxic INTEGER
);

CREATE TABLE atoms (
  atom_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  compound_id TEXT,
  element TEXT,
  position INTEGER
);

CREATE TABLE bonds (
  bond_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  compound_id TEXT,
  atom1_id INTEGER,
  atom2_id INTEGER,
  bond_type TEXT
);

CREATE TABLE reactions (
  reaction_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  reactant_id TEXT,
  product_id TEXT,
  catalyst TEXT,
  temperature REAL
);
SELECT name FROM compounds ORDER BY name

Find the most complex compounds (most atoms and bonds)

Schema:
CREATE TABLE compounds (
  compound_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT,
  formula TEXT,
  molecular_weight REAL,
  is_toxic INTEGER
);

CREATE TABLE atoms (
  atom_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  compound_id TEXT,
  element TEXT,
  position INTEGER
);

CREATE TABLE bonds (
  bond_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  compound_id TEXT,
  atom1_id INTEGER,
  atom2_id INTEGER,
  bond_type TEXT
);

CREATE TABLE reactions (
  reaction_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  reactant_id TEXT,
  product_id TEXT,
  catalyst TEXT,
  temperature REAL
);

SELECT c.name, COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id) as atoms, COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_id) as bonds FROM compounds c JOIN atoms a ON c.compound_id = a.compound_id JOIN bonds b ON c.compound_id = b.compound_id GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY atoms DESC, bonds DESC LIMIT 5
